nasb.text: Then he said to me, “To build a temple for her in the land of Shinar; and when it is prepared, she will be set there on her own pedestal.”

esv.text: He said to me, “To the land of Shinar, to build a house for it. And when this is prepared, they will set the basket down there on its base.”

cnv.text: 他回答我：“要在示拿地為那量器建造房子；房子預備好了，就在那裡把它安放在它自己的地方。”

ccb.text: 他说：“要带到示拿，在那里为它建造房屋，建好后就把它安置在底座上。”
